chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No.215 of 2014 Collector of Customs Versus M/s Suleman Sons Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply of advocate ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA 1500/14 3. For hearing of main case Dated: 15.12.2021 None present. -.-.- This matter is pending since 2014 and till date applicant and his counsel have failed to satisfy the Court for issuance of notices. The counsel for applicant is continuously seeking time for one reason or the other. On 20.11.2015 he sought time to reframe the questions of law and on the following dated i.e. 09.09.2016 case was adjourned in the interest of justice as no one was in attendance on behalf of the applicant. Today position is same. There is no intimation either. Instant Special Customs Reference Application is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
